title: Handle testbench runtime data files
route: Use when CSIM says it could not open an input data file or the runtime exits before checking results.
summary: Do not hard-code missing files into the kernel. Preserve the expected file-driven testbench behavior and keep generated kernel code deterministic.
anti_patterns: do not replace file I/O in the testbench
risk: Usually indicates runner/runtime setup rather than kernel logic.
